title: Claude Cowork: The #1 Thing To Know
summary: Claude Cowork is an AI tool that accepts outcome-first instructions, where users describe end results rather than step-by-step tasks. Unlike Claude Chat which requires task-first prompting with manual execution of steps, Cowork autonomously handles workflows like file renaming and organization.
